summary: Tested re-fixes for MAJOR-01 (target suggestion) and MAJOR-03 (prediction engine model selection). Both bugs verified as FIXED through code review and UI testing.

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend changes to test

context_for_next_testing_agent: MAJOR-01 and MAJOR-03 bugs are now fixed. Session persistence between page navigations can be flaky - models may not persist when navigating between tabs. This is a known behavior, not a new bug.

MAJOR-01.description: Target suggestion must suggest 'charges' (NOT 'sex') for insurance-type datasets

test_details.actual_result: Suggested target: charges - Numeric with high variability (std: 12164.23) — best for regression
test_details.fix_explanation: Added matchesFinancial flag for financial keywords like 'charges'. Numeric columns matching financial keywords get +25 bonus and skip the uniqueness penalty (line 802-803).

MAJOR-03.description: Prediction engine must use the SAME model displayed in the dropdown (best model, not last trained)

test_details.test_scenario: Trained 3 models with Auto algorithm: Linear Regression (R² 0.931), Decision Tree (R² -0.002), Random Forest (R² 0.372)
test_details.expected_result: Best model (Linear Regression) should be pre-selected in dropdown and used for predictions
test_details.actual_result: Dropdown correctly showed 'Linear Regression — R² 0.931 — Target: Price' as selected (index 0)
test_details.fix_explanation: handlePredict and handleBatchPredict now use getBestModelIdx(models) instead of models.length-1 when selectedModelIdx is -1 (default). getBestModelIdx finds model with highest accuracy (classification) or R² (regression).

getBestModelIdx_function.logic: Iterates through models, compares accuracy (classification) or R² (regression), returns index of best model

handlePredict_fix.old_code: const idx = selectedModelIdx >= 0 && selectedModelIdx < models.length ? selectedModelIdx : models.length - 1
handlePredict_fix.new_code: const idx = selectedModelIdx >= 0 && selectedModelIdx < models.length ? selectedModelIdx : getBestModelIdx(models)

handleBatchPredict_fix.old_code: const idx = selectedModelIdx >= 0 && selectedModelIdx < models.length ? selectedModelIdx : models.length - 1
handleBatchPredict_fix.new_code: const idx = selectedModelIdx >= 0 && selectedModelIdx < models.length ? selectedModelIdx : getBestModelIdx(models)

key_changes: Numeric columns matching financial keywords get +25 bonus (line 787)
Uniqueness penalty skips numeric columns matching keywords (line 802-803)

target_suggestion_test.details: Uploaded CSV with charges column, system correctly suggested 'charges' for regression

model_selection_test.details: After training with Auto, dropdown correctly pre-selected best model (Linear Regression R² 0.931)

session_persistence.details: Models sometimes don't persist between page navigations - known behavior
